description: Create a side-view profile drawing of a skatepark quarter pipe ramp in LibreCAD. The drawing must include three layers: 'TEMPLATE' (Color: White/7), 'COPING' (Color: Red/1), and 'DIMENSIONS' (Color: Cyan/4). The 'TEMPLATE' layer should contain a 90-degree transition arc (Radius: 1800mm, Center: 0,1800, Start: 0,0, End: 1800,1800), a horizontal deck line from (1800, 1800) to (2400, 1800), and enclosure lines from (2400, 1800) to (2400, 0) and back to (0, 0). The 'COPING' layer must feature a circle (Center: 1800,1800, Radius: 30mm). The 'DIMENSIONS' layer must include a vertical dimension for the 1800mm height, a horizontal dimension for the 600mm deck width, and a radial dimension for the 1800mm radius. Save the drawing as a DXF file to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/quarter_pipe.dxf.
